tasks.title: Create USER_BOOKMARK_VIEW_ANY and METRICS_RESET permissions in PermissionEnum and seed
tasks.description:
Add two new permissions to the system:
1. `USER_BOOKMARK_VIEW_ANY` - allows viewing any user's bookmarks (for admin support)
2. `METRICS_RESET` - allows resetting metrics counters

Steps:
1. Add both to `PermissionEnum` in `packages/schemas/src/entities/permission/`
2. Add to seed data for ADMIN and SUPER_ADMIN roles in `packages/seed/src/data/`
3. Run typecheck to verify enum usage compiles
4. Run existing permission tests

Gaps: GAP-27 (partial), GAP-21 (partial)
Files: `packages/schemas/src/entities/permission/`, `packages/seed/src/data/`
Tests: Verify permissions exist in enum, seed includes them for correct roles

tasks.title: Add _isSystemActor flag to Actor type and createSystemActor()
tasks.description:
Add a `_isSystemActor` boolean flag to the Actor type and set it in `createSystemActor()`. This will be used by T-011 to add a runtime guard in authorization middleware.

Steps:
1. Add optional `_isSystemActor?: boolean` to Actor type in `packages/schemas/src/entities/actor/`
2. Set `_isSystemActor: true` in `createSystemActor()` in `apps/api/src/utils/actor.ts:32-36`
3. Ensure regular actor creation does NOT set this flag

Gaps: GAP-48 (partial)
Files: `packages/schemas/src/entities/actor/`, `apps/api/src/utils/actor.ts`
Tests: createSystemActor returns actor with _isSystemActor=true, getActorFromContext returns actors without flag

tasks.title: Use timingSafeEqual for CRON_SECRET + enforce min(32) for BETTER_AUTH_SECRET
tasks.description:
Two crypto hardening fixes:
1. Replace `===` with `crypto.timingSafeEqual(Buffer.from(a), Buffer.from(b))` at `cron/middleware.ts:43,51`
2. Change `z.string().min(1)` to `z.string().min(32, 'Better Auth secret must be at least 32 characters')` at `env.ts:66`

Gaps: GAP-23, GAP-40
Files: `apps/api/src/cron/middleware.ts`, `apps/api/src/utils/env.ts`
Tests: Cron middleware still authenticates correctly with valid secret; env rejects secrets < 32 chars

tasks.title: Replace string literals with RoleEnum.HOST and isGuestActor()
tasks.description:
Fix string literal role references:
1. Replace `'HOST'` with `RoleEnum.HOST` at `auth.ts:309,332` (and line 273 if applicable)
2. Replace `actor.role !== 'GUEST'` with `!isGuestActor(actor)` at `auth/me.ts:21`

Gaps: GAP-24, GAP-16
Files: `apps/api/src/lib/auth.ts`, `apps/api/src/routes/auth/me.ts`
Tests: Existing auth and me tests pass unchanged

tasks.title: OAuth cross-validation + replace Math.random() in utils and request-id
tasks.description:
Three fixes:
1. Add superRefine in env.ts: if HOSPEDA_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID is set, require HOSPEDA_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET (same for Facebook)
2. Replace Math.random() with crypto.getRandomValues() in `packages/utils/src/string.ts:133-143` (randomString function)
3. Replace Math.random() with crypto.randomUUID() in `apps/api/src/utils/request-id.ts:9`

Gaps: GAP-39, GAP-52, GAP-56
Files: `apps/api/src/utils/env.ts`, `packages/utils/src/string.ts`, `apps/api/src/utils/request-id.ts`
Tests: Env rejects clientId without clientSecret; randomString produces valid output; requestId is UUID format

tasks.title: Sanitize health endpoints - remove DB error details and NODE_ENV
tasks.description:
Fix information leaks in health endpoints:
1. Replace raw DB error message at `db-health.ts:77` with generic 'Database health check failed'
2. Remove `environment: process.env.NODE_ENV` from `health.ts:20`, `db-health.ts:58,82`

Gaps: GAP-25, GAP-35
Files: `apps/api/src/routes/health/db-health.ts`, `apps/api/src/routes/health/health.ts`
Tests: Health endpoint returns sanitized errors; response body has no 'environment' field

tasks.title: Remove PII from logs + mask billing data + fix password logging
tasks.description:
Three information leak fixes:
1. Remove firstName/lastName/email from INFO log at `contact/submit.ts:42-52`. Keep only contactType, accommodationId, messageLength, emailDomain
2. Mask preapproval IDs in `subscription-logic.ts:196-199,284-293` - show only last 4 chars (e.g., '***...a1b2')
3. Replace `logger.info('Generated password: ...')` with `console.warn` to stderr at `superAdminLoader.ts:59`. Update `docs/guides/environment-variables.md` to document this behavior

Gaps: GAP-29, GAP-11, GAP-46, GAP-66
Files: `apps/api/src/routes/contact/submit.ts`, `apps/api/src/routes/webhooks/mercadopago/subscription-logic.ts`, `packages/seed/src/utils/superAdminLoader.ts`, `docs/guides/environment-variables.md`
Tests: Log output doesn't contain PII fields; masked IDs show ***...xxxx pattern; no logger.info for passwords

tasks.title: Sanitize file.name in error responses + generic billing-usage errors
tasks.description:
Two error response fixes:
1. Replace `file.name` with generic message in error responses at `reports/create-report.ts:118,131,155` and `feedback/submit.ts:292`
2. Return generic error 'Failed to get system usage stats' from `billing-usage.service.ts:155`. Show detailed error only when `HOSPEDA_API_DEBUG_ERRORS` env var is true

Gaps: GAP-58, GAP-61
Files: `apps/api/src/routes/reports/create-report.ts`, `apps/api/src/routes/feedback/submit.ts`, `apps/api/src/services/billing-usage.service.ts`
Tests: Error responses don't contain file names; billing errors generic unless debug flag set

tasks.title: Fix rate limiting: trust proxy docs, signout auth, path classification, contact rate limit
tasks.description:
Four rate limiting fixes:
1. Document API_RATE_LIMIT_TRUST_PROXY=true requirement for Vercel in deployment docs and env-variables.md
2. In `signout.ts`: only call clearRateLimitForIp when user is authenticated (check actor before clearing)
3. In `rate-limit.ts:233-244`: replace `path.includes('/auth/')` etc. with `path.startsWith('/api/v1/auth/')` pattern
4. Add `customRateLimit: { requests: 5, windowMs: 60000 }` to contact form route in `contact/submit.ts`

Gaps: GAP-03, GAP-30, GAP-43, GAP-62
Files: `apps/api/src/routes/auth/signout.ts`, `apps/api/src/middlewares/rate-limit.ts`, `apps/api/src/routes/contact/submit.ts`, `docs/guides/environment-variables.md`
Tests: getEndpointType classifies correctly; contact form rate limited; signout doesn't clear rate limit for unauthenticated

tasks.title: Remove dead sanitization code from validation middleware
tasks.description:
Remove two blocks of dead code:
1. Remove header sanitization at `validation.ts:107-111` (Object.assign on Headers has no effect)
2. Remove query param sanitization at `validation.ts:115-125` (defineProperty on c.req doesn't affect c.req.query())

Gaps: GAP-41, GAP-42
Files: `apps/api/src/middlewares/validation.ts`
Tests: Existing validation tests pass; middleware works without dead code

tasks.title: Add runtime guard rejecting system actors from HTTP context
tasks.description:
Add a check in authorization middleware that rejects actors with `_isSystemActor: true` flag. System actors should only be used in background jobs and cron, never in HTTP request handlers.

Steps:
1. In `authorizationMiddleware`, check if `actor._isSystemActor === true`
2. If so, log a security warning and throw HTTPException(403)
3. This prevents accidental injection of createSystemActor() in route handlers

Gaps: GAP-48 (part 2)
Depends on: T-002
Files: `apps/api/src/middlewares/authorization.ts`
Tests: Authorization middleware rejects system actors with 403; allows normal actors

tasks.title: Remove SUPER_ADMIN role bypasses in authorization and permission utils
tasks.description:
Remove redundant `actor.role === RoleEnum.SUPER_ADMIN` bypasses. SUPER_ADMIN already has all permissions seeded.

Remove from:
1. `authorization.ts:52-53` - role bypass before permission check
2. `billing-admin-guard.middleware.ts:85` - hasAdminAccess function
3. `permission.ts:120` - entity permission check

Replace with standard permission check flow (the existing permission checks will cover SUPER_ADMIN via seeded permissions).

Gaps: GAP-05
Files: `apps/api/src/middlewares/authorization.ts`, `apps/api/src/middlewares/billing-admin-guard.middleware.ts`, `packages/service-core/src/utils/permission.ts`
Tests: SUPER_ADMIN still authorized via permissions (not role bypass); all existing permission tests pass

tasks.title: Fix direct role checks in promo-codes routes
tasks.description:
Replace direct role checks with permission checks in billing promo-codes:
1. At `promo-codes.ts:229-234`: replace `actor.role !== RoleEnum.ADMIN && actor.role !== RoleEnum.SUPER_ADMIN` with `!actor.permissions?.includes(PermissionEnum.BILLING_MANAGE)` (or appropriate billing permission)
2. At `promo-codes.ts:280-285`: same replacement
3. Replace `throw new Error(...)` with `throw new HTTPException(403, { message: '...' })` in both locations

Gaps: GAP-33
Files: `apps/api/src/routes/billing/promo-codes.ts`
Tests: Promo code routes return 403 (not 500) for unauthorized users; admin with permission can access

tasks.title: Add UserBookmark ownership verification + admin permission bypass
tasks.description:
Fix bookmark access control:
1. In `userBookmark.permissions.ts`: add admin bypass via `USER_BOOKMARK_VIEW_ANY` permission in `canAccessBookmark`
2. In `userBookmark.service.ts:83-90`: modify `_canList`/`_canSearch`/`_canCount` to verify ownership (filter by actor.id) unless actor has `USER_BOOKMARK_VIEW_ANY` permission
3. In `listBookmarksByEntity`: add ownership filter for non-admin actors

Gaps: GAP-27, GAP-47
Depends on: T-001
Files: `packages/service-core/src/services/userBookmark/userBookmark.permissions.ts`, `packages/service-core/src/services/userBookmark/userBookmark.service.ts`
Tests: Regular user only sees own bookmarks; admin with USER_BOOKMARK_VIEW_ANY sees all; guest denied

tasks.title: Add METRICS_RESET permission check + billing ownership fail-closed
tasks.description:
Two permission fixes:
1. Add `METRICS_RESET` permission requirement to `POST /metrics/reset` endpoint
2. Change billing ownership middleware default from pass-through to fail-closed at `billing-ownership.middleware.ts:241-243`. Unknown resource types with IDs should return 403 with a warning log.

Gaps: GAP-21, GAP-49
Depends on: T-001
Files: `apps/api/src/routes/metrics/`, `apps/api/src/middlewares/billing-ownership.middleware.ts`
Tests: Metrics reset requires METRICS_RESET permission; unknown billing resource type returns 403

tasks.title: Wrap webhook subscription update + audit log in database transaction
tasks.description:
Wrap the subscription status UPDATE and audit log INSERT in a `db.transaction()` at `subscription-logic.ts:279-314`.

The audit log INSERT should still catch errors within the transaction (log and continue, don't rollback on audit failure), but both operations are now atomic: if the UPDATE fails, no audit log is created.

Gaps: GAP-04
Files: `apps/api/src/routes/webhooks/mercadopago/subscription-logic.ts`
Tests: Both operations succeed atomically; transaction rolls back on update failure; audit error doesn't crash transaction

tasks.title: Remove deprecated webhookEventIds Map + add Redis fallback logging
tasks.description:
Two cleanup fixes:
1. Remove deprecated `webhookEventIds` Map from `utils.ts:22` and its export from `index.ts:13`
2. Add `apiLogger.warn('Redis unavailable, falling back to in-memory store', { error })` in empty catch blocks at `rate-limit.ts:101,115,126,153,179`

Gaps: GAP-31, GAP-20
Files: `apps/api/src/routes/webhooks/mercadopago/utils.ts`, `apps/api/src/routes/webhooks/mercadopago/index.ts`, `apps/api/src/middlewares/rate-limit.ts`
Tests: No import errors after Map removal; Redis fallback logs warning (mock test)

tasks.title: Delete orphan exchange-rate write files in protected tier
tasks.description:
Delete 4 unmounted write operation files in `apps/api/src/routes/exchange-rates/protected/`:
- create.ts
- update-config.ts
- delete.ts
- fetch-now.ts

These files implement admin operations using createProtectedRoute but are NOT mounted in the router. They are dead code.

Gaps: GAP-32
Files to delete: 4 files in `apps/api/src/routes/exchange-rates/protected/`
Tests: Build passes, no import errors, protected/index.ts unchanged

tasks.title: Remove exchange-rate protected tier duplication
tasks.description:
Remove the duplicated protected tier for exchange rates:
1. The /config and /history endpoints exist in BOTH `/protected/exchange-rates/` and `/admin/exchange-rates/`
2. Remove the protected tier mount entirely (or keep only public-appropriate read operations)
3. Update any frontend references if needed

Gaps: GAP-22
Depends on: T-018
Files: `apps/api/src/routes/exchange-rates/protected/index.ts`, `apps/api/src/routes/index.ts`
Tests: Admin exchange rate routes work; protected routes removed; no frontend breaks

tasks.title: Consolidate cron routes - remove /api/v1/cron public access
tasks.description:
Cron has dual mounts: `/api/v1/cron` (secret-based) and `/api/v1/admin/cron` (permission-based). The `/api/v1/cron` path is used by Vercel scheduler.

Options:
- Keep `/api/v1/cron` for Vercel scheduler (it uses CRON_SECRET, not public) but document it as internal-only
- Ensure admin panel only uses `/api/v1/admin/cron`
- Remove any documentation that treats `/api/v1/cron` as a public API

Gaps: GAP-14 (cron part)
Files: `apps/api/src/routes/index.ts`, `apps/api/src/cron/`, documentation
Tests: Cron jobs still triggerable via secret; admin cron works with permissions

tasks.title: Move billing admin-only operations from protected to admin tier
tasks.description:
Identify billing operations in `/protected/billing/` that are admin-only and move them to `/admin/billing/`:
- metrics/system-usage
- metrics/approaching-limits
- Any customer search/management operations that only admins use

Update admin frontend URL references in hooks/API calls accordingly.
Clean change: no backward-compatible redirects.

Gaps: GAP-14 (billing part)
Files: `apps/api/src/routes/billing/index.ts`, `apps/api/src/routes/index.ts`, `apps/admin/src/` (hooks/API calls)
Tests: Admin billing operations work at new URLs; user billing operations unchanged; admin panel loads correctly

tasks.title: Move reports admin operations to admin tier
tasks.description:
If reports has admin-only operations (list all reports, manage labels), move them to `/admin/reports/`. Keep user-facing operations (create report, list own, get labels) at `/protected/reports/`.

Gaps: GAP-14 (reports part)
Files: `apps/api/src/routes/reports/`, `apps/api/src/routes/index.ts`
Tests: User can create reports at /protected/; admin can manage all reports at /admin/

tasks.title: Fix JSON-LD XSS in Breadcrumb and propietarios Astro components
tasks.description:
Replace raw JSON.stringify with the existing JsonLd component (which escapes < as \u003c):
1. `Breadcrumb.astro:114` - replace `<script type="application/ld+json" set:html={JSON.stringify(jsonLd)} />` with `<JsonLd data={jsonLd} />`
2. `propietarios/index.astro:96` - same replacement

The JsonLd component already exists at `apps/web/src/components/seo/JsonLd.astro` with proper escaping.

Gaps: GAP-06
Files: `apps/web/src/components/shared/Breadcrumb.astro`, `apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/propietarios/index.astro`
Tests: JSON-LD output escapes < characters as \u003c

tasks.title: Add UUID validation to accommodation route parameters
tasks.description:
Add `requestParams` with `z.string().uuid()` validation to 3 accommodation routes:
1. `getFaqs.ts:24` - validate `id` param
2. `getByDestination.ts:24` - validate `destinationId` param
3. `getTopRatedByDestination.ts:24` - validate `destinationId` param

Gaps: GAP-28
Files: `apps/api/src/routes/accommodation/protected/getFaqs.ts`, `apps/api/src/routes/accommodation/public/getByDestination.ts`, `apps/api/src/routes/accommodation/public/getTopRatedByDestination.ts`
Tests: Invalid UUID returns 400 validation error; valid UUID passes through

tasks.title: Add Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only headers to web and admin vercel.json
tasks.description:
Add CSP in Report-Only mode to detect violations without breaking:
1. Add `Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only` header to `apps/web/vercel.json`
2. Add `Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only` header to `apps/admin/vercel.json`

Start with a permissive policy that covers known requirements:
- `default-src 'self'`
- `script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'` (for Astro/React hydration)
- `style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'` (for Tailwind)
- `img-src 'self' data: https:`
- `connect-src 'self' https://api.mercadopago.com` (and API URL)
- `font-src 'self'`

Gaps: GAP-45
Files: `apps/web/vercel.json`, `apps/admin/vercel.json`
Tests: Headers present in vercel.json config; deploy does not break

tasks.title: Fix CI audit blocking for critical/high vulnerabilities
tasks.description:
Remove `continue-on-error: true` and `|| true` from pnpm audit step in CI pipeline:
1. Edit `.github/workflows/ci.yml:63-69`
2. Keep `--audit-level=critical` so only critical CVEs block
3. Optionally add a separate step for high-level audit with continue-on-error for visibility

Gaps: GAP-12
Files: `.github/workflows/ci.yml`
Tests: CI workflow syntax valid (use `act` or manual verification)

tasks.title: Fix GitHub workflow inconsistencies (Node version, pnpm action, engines)
tasks.description:
Three CI/CD fixes:
1. Update `refresh-search.yml:13` to use `HOSPEDA_DATABASE_URL` (not `DATABASE_URL`) and Node 20 (not 18)
2. Update `docs.yml:34,59,80` to use `pnpm/action-setup@v4` and read version from `packageManager` field
3. Change `engines.node` from `>=18` to `>=20` in root `package.json:77`

Gaps: GAP-55, GAP-63, GAP-64
Files: `.github/workflows/refresh-search.yml`, `.github/workflows/docs.yml`, `package.json`
Tests: Workflow syntax valid; engines constraint updated

tasks.title: Replace console.error/console.warn with structured logger
tasks.description:

2. `past-due-grace.middleware.ts:29-33`: replace `console.warn` with `apiLogger.warn`

Tests: No console.* calls in modified files; logging works correctly

tasks.title: Clean bookmark permissions dead code + error type guard in event-handler
tasks.description:
Two cleanup fixes:
1. In `userBookmark.permissions.ts`: remove commented-out code (line 13) and Spanish JSDoc comments (lines 6-8, 23-25). Replace with English.
2. In `event-handler.ts:223-230`: add `instanceof Error` type guard before accessing `error.stack`

Gaps: GAP-17, GAP-60
Files: `packages/service-core/src/services/userBookmark/userBookmark.permissions.ts`, `apps/api/src/routes/webhooks/mercadopago/event-handler.ts`

tasks.description:

Tests: Examples compile (if .ts); no actor.role patterns remain

tasks.title: Update ACCEPTED_RISKS.md with SEC-IDs, new accepted risks, and numbering fix
tasks.description:
Documentation updates to ACCEPTED_RISKS.md:
1. GAP-18: Add SEC-ID cross-references to all 11 risks, fix non-sequential numbering (5,7,8,6,9,11,10)
2. GAP-08: Add entitlements fail-closed limitation as accepted risk (QZPayEntitlementService has no getById)
3. GAP-44: Add /auth/me permission exposure as accepted risk (user's own data, needed for client-side gating)
4. GAP-65: Document webhook-retry schedule mismatch as Vercel free plan limitation (daily vs hourly)

Gaps: GAP-18, GAP-08, GAP-44, GAP-65
Files: `docs/security/ACCEPTED_RISKS.md`

tasks.title: Fix CORS docs + document undocumented cron jobs
tasks.description:

1. GAP-19: Remove references to `x-actor-id` and `x-user-id` from `cors-configuration.md:40,119-121` (headers no longer exist)
2. GAP-54: Document `exchange-rate-fetch` and `dunning` cron jobs in `cron-system.md` (Registered Jobs section)
